zh.Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zürich, Switzerl: 瑞士爾利文特瑟爾爾爾福林根
zh.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller於1611年4月21日出生在瑞士波盧次維爾。他於1636年5月9日與Verena Boesinger在瑞士波藍根塔爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年8月13日在瑞士爾利文特瑟爾爾爾福林根享年65歲。

zh-hans.Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zürich, Switzerl: 瑞士爾利文特瑟爾爾爾福林根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller于1611年4月21日出生在瑞士波盧次維爾。他于1636年5月9日与Verena Boesinger在瑞士波藍根塔爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年8月13日在瑞士爾利文特瑟爾爾爾福林根享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Müller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Fritz, Franz, Gerhard, Uwe, Dieter, Heinz, Jurgen.
German (Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; mainly Müller): see Mueller . This surname is also very common in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Windmiller
meanings: Americanized form of German Windmüller, an occupational name for a miller (see Muller ).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

historicEvents.description: All European peace treaty formally accepts Switzerland as an independent nation.

en.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller was born on 21 April 1611, in Lotzwil, Bern, Switzerland. He married Verena Boesinger on 9 May 1636, in Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 13 August 1676, in Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zürich, Switzerland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller est né le 21 avril 1611, à Lotzwil, Berne, Suisse. Il a épousé Verena Boesinger le 9 mai 1636, à Langenthal, Berne, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 13 août 1676, à Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zurich, Suisse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller wurde am 21. April 1611 in Lotzwil, Bern, Schweiz geboren. Er hat am 9. Mai 1636 in Langenthal, Bern, Schweiz Verena Boesinger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 13. August 1676 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zürich, Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller è nato il il 21 aprile 1611 nel Lotzwil, Berna, Svizzera. Lui sposato Verena Boesinger il 9 maggio 1636, nel Langenthal, Berna, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1676, nel Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zurigo, Svizzera, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland: スイスバーンランジェンサル
ja.lifeSummary: Jacob Müllerは1611年4月21日にスイスバーンロトズウィルで生まれた。1636年5月9日にスイスバーンランジェンサルでVerena Boesingerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年8月13日にスイスズuリチウィンテルサーウuルフリンジェンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller(은)는 1611년 4월 21일 스위스 버 로츠윌에서 태어났다. 그는 1636년 5월 9일 스위스 버 랭솔에서 Verena Boesinger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 8월 13일 스위스 즈u리치 윈터스어 wu플링에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.21 April 1611–13 August 1676: 1611 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 21–1676 оны Наймдугаар сарын 13

pt.21 April 1611–13 August 1676: 21 de abril de 1611–13 de agosto de 1676
pt.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller nasceu em 21 de abril de 1611, em Lotzwil, Bern, Suiça. Ele casou-se com Verena Boesinger em 9 de maio de 1636, em Langenthal, Bern, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1676, em Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zürich, Suiça, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller родился 21 апреля 1611 г. в местности лоцвил, бирн, Швейцария. Он женился на женщине по имени Verena Boesinger 9 мая 1636 г. в местности лангентэл, бирн, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 13 августа 1676 г. в местности вuлфлинген, винтиртур, зuрич, Швейцария в возрасте 65 лет.

es.21 April 1611–13 August 1676: 21 de abril de 1611–13 de agosto de 1676
es.lifeSummary: Jacob Müller nació el 21 de abril de 1611, en Lotzwil, Bern, Suiza. Se casó con Verena Boesinger el 9 de mayo de 1636, en Langenthal, Bern, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1676, en Wülflingen, Winterthur, Zürich, Suiza, a la edad de 65 años.
